name: Triple-Mustard Chicken Dijon
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Dry white wine, preferably Chardonnay
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate breasts if attached and cut each in half crosswise. Trim any fat from the chicken.
2. Melt butter in a large flame-proof casserole dish.
3. Cook onion over moderate heat until soft, about 3 minutes.
4. Add chicken and cook until no longer pink on the outside, 5 to 7 minutes.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together the mustards and wine. Pour over chicken and bring to a boil.
6. Add broth. Simmer partially covered for 25 to 30 minutes, until chicken is tender and cooked through.
7. Remove from heat and stir in sour cream.
